回上一頁	國立金門大學	 
 	教學綱要	 

部別 : 日間部學士班	114學年度第2學期	列印日期 : 2026/05/24
科目名稱 : 西洋文學概論(二) (Introduction to Western Literature II)	開課班級 : 應英二年級	學　　分 : 2.0	授課時數 : 2.0
授課教師 : 洪淑敏	必選修 : 必修	 	 


1.教學目標
This course explores Western culture and literary classics.This course also reads Western classic literary works to further understand the formation and development of various important issues in Western culture. The topics discussed include the value of existence, community identity, power class, gender, technology and nature, etc. 


2.教學綱要
Students are going to analyze and discuss the following issues: In Frankenstein, students discuss the relationships between science and humanity, science and ethics, nature and nurture. In The Word for World Is Forest, students are going to discuss the topics about Colonialism and Imperialism, environmental destruction. In Oryx and Crack, students are going to discuss the development of transhuman. 


3.教科書

6.成績評定及課堂要求
Midterm Exam 30% Final Exam 30% Class Attendance and participation 20% Personal or Group presentation, homework 20% 
The use of cell phones and the lack of textbooks may result in a deduction of your grade.
